brief.rationale: Email body drops the {{first_name}} merge token — should fail personalization_tokens only.

email.subject_a: Maya's cauliflower steak just landed, friend
email.subject_b: Maya's tandoori cauliflower — early access tonight
email.body: Maya's tandoori cauliflower steak is here, friend — and it's not asking for permission. Smoke, char, coconut-yogurt finish — the fork works overtime. Not a kit. Just dinner — already cooked. [Add to plan]({{short_url}})

sms.body: Hey there — Maya's tandoori cauliflower steak just landed. Tap → {{short_url}}

push.title: Maya's cauliflower steak just landed
push.body: Tap to add it before Sunday's cutoff.
